visual-anti-patterns.notes: Landing page has a purple-to-blue/lavender gradient background and floating decorative orbs/blobs (purple, blue, green circles); no other anti-patterns observed

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large tappable emoji-based object grid, big labeled toolbar buttons, playful Spark prompts, minimal text density; AI chat panel is slightly text-heavy

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent, button style, and typography across all pages; minor drift in background treatment (decorated landing vs plain builder vs light-blue gallery)

visual-accessibility.notes: Clear text labels accompany all toolbar and object icons; reasonable contrast on primary text; no visible focus rings and gray subtitle text on landing has marginal contrast
